subcodes.first_line: O thou who yearnest to behold the effulgent rays of the All-Powerful Lord, the Chosen One, from every direction have they shone forth upon all regions and souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق دیدار انوار فیض رب مختار از جمیع اشطار بر کل اقطار تابیده و نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
